_notes: This is NOT a runnable workflow — it shows which fields to replace with __PLACEHOLDER__ markers.
Export your real workflow from ComfyUI (Save → Save API Format), then replace the values below.
- Find the LoadImage node and set its 'image' field to '__INPUT_IMAGE__'
- Find the multi-view model node and set 'azimuth' to '__AZIMUTH__', 'elevation' to '__ELEVATION__'
For models that output a grid of views (e.g. 2x2), the pipeline will use the first
downloaded image.  If your model outputs individual images per view, the pipeline will
collect all of them.  ComfyUI reports all SaveImage node outputs.
